question: The chart displays departmental energy consumption. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: R&D uses more energy than all the other departments combined.
options.B: R&D has nearly 6 times as many kWh as Packaging, as suggested by the bar size and color.
options.C: Packaging and R&D have identical values.
options.D: R&D has the highest value among the categories shown.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
